assessments.rationale: Saturated feeders on dense urban sites are common but not physically impossible; standard DSO coordination path solves it.
assessments.mitigation: DSO pre-feasibility and Netzanschlussbegehren early, Cable upsizing or new dedicated MV feeder, Size below LV threshold (<500 kW) where MV capacity blocked

assessments.rationale: 40-80 m²/MWh is achievable on commercial parcels; dense office sites require configuration work, not physics breakthroughs.
assessments.mitigation: Use underused parking plots or vacant site corners, Rooftop placement with structural reinforcement, Basement or container-in-plantroom layouts for urban sites

assessments.rationale: VdS / local Feuerwehr clearance is routine for DE C&I BESS; certification path fully defined.
assessments.mitigation: Cluster layout below 3 MWh per fire compartment, Separation walls and spacing per VdS guidance, Feuerwehr access plan embedded in Baugenehmigung

assessments.rationale: Hazard cannot be eliminated but containment is standard and pre-engineered into Mein Solar's reference container.
assessments.mitigation: NOVEC 1230 / aerosol suppression and deflagration venting, Cell-level BMS shutdown and compartmentalization, Gas detection interlock with container isolation

assessments.rationale: Certification is on critical path but parallelizable; Mein Solar has already executed this path at 4.5 MW / 9 MWh scale.
assessments.mitigation: Parallel FGW TR3 / TR8 certification tracks, Specify pre-certified PCS / transformer SKUs, Early DSO engagement and acceptance test scheduling

assessments.rationale: Cost/FX exposure is never a physical knockout; managed via procurement strategy.
assessments.mitigation: Dual-source LFP framework agreement (CN + KR), EUR/USD FX hedge on cell-lot purchases, CRMA / EU-Battery-Reg compliance audit trail

assessments.rationale: DE commercial outdoor ambient (-15 to +38 degC) sits fully inside the -20 to +50 degC container rating.
10-15 percent RTE loss is already priced into peak-shaving / arbitrage IRR; does not prevent deployment.
DE 2025/26 installed CAPEX ~220-380 EUR/kWh sits inside the viable band; cost is never a knockout.
assessments.mitigation: Stack revenue: Netzentgelte reduction + peak shaving + intraday arbitrage, Leverage 50 percent first-year depreciation plus VDE 2510 corp-tax discount, Structure PV+BESS bundle or tenant-PPA to defer CAPEX to balance-sheet partner
